title: EXPO-FT: Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning Finetuning for Vision-Language-Action Models
summary: EXPO-FT is a method for finetuning pretrained Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies using online reinforcement learning with minimal real-world interaction. It introduces an edit actor that predicts residual corrections to sampled action chunks and a Q-function for selecting refined action proposals, enabling sample-efficient policy improvement. The approach supports operator overrides for failure states and is designed to substantially reduce the number of real-world rollouts needed to adapt pretrained VLA models to new tasks.
